docket_entries.description: NTC AND MTN TO COMPEL ANSWERS TO PETITIONER'S FIRST SET OF DEMAND FOR PRODUCTION AND INSPECTION OF DOCUMENTS MEMO OF P AND A; DECLARATION, PROOF OF SERVICE FILED BY PETITIONER PEOPLE OF THE STATE OF CALIFORNIA HEARING SET FOR JUL-29-2009 AT 10:30 AM IN DEPT 612
MINI-MINUTES FOR FEB-24-2010 10:30 AM FOR DEPT 612

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: JUDGMENT OF FORFEITURE AND DISPOSITION PURSUANT TO STIPULATION AS TO CLAIMANT PERCY REED ONLY. RESPONDENT PROPERTY SUBJECT TO DISPOSITION: $998.00 U.S CURRENCY ; $44.00 US CURRENCY PLUS INTEREST SINCE DATE OF DEPOSIT IS HEREBY DECLARED FORFEITED PURSUANT TO H&S 11470 ET SEQ AND DISPOSED OF AS PROVIDED BY H&S 11489. SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT

DISCOVERY 612, NO APPEARANCES ON THIS MATTER. NO OPPOSITION HAS BEEN FILED. RESPONDENT IS ORDERED TO RESPOND WITHIN 15 DAYS OF NOTICE OF THIS ORDER. COMMISSIONER EVERETT A. HEWLETT, JR. MATTER NOT REPORTED.

calendar.matters:
Notice Of Motion For Order For Terminating Sanctions And Striking Claim As To Claimant Michelle Chapman Only
Off Calendar Feb-24-2010 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: NO APPEARANCES ON THIS MATTER. THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING AS FOLLOWS: PETITIONER PEOPLE OF THE STATE OF CALIFORNIA's Petitioner's Motion For Terminating Sanctions And Striking Claim As To Claimant Michelle Chapman Only is granted. No opposition has been filed. Petitioner may withdraw the Petition For Forfeiture and may proceed with Non-Judicial Forfeiture proceedings. COMMISSIONER EVERETT A. HEWLETT, JR. NOT REPORTED.

Notice Of Motion To Compel Answers To Petitioner'S First Set Of Demand For Production And Inspection Of Documents; Petitoner'S First Set Of Special Interrogatories S To Claimant Percy Reed Only
Off Calendar Dec-29-2009 Off Calendar

Ntc And Mtn To Compel Answers To Petitioner'S First Set Of Demand For Production And Inspection Of Documents Memo Of P And A; Declaration
Off Calendar Jul-29-2009 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: NO APPEARANCES ON THIS MATTER. THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING AS FOLLOWS: Petitioner People of the State of California's Motion To Compel Answers To Petitioner's First Set Of Demand For Production And Inspection Of Documents, Petitioner's First Set Of Special Interrogatories, Judicial Council Form Interrogatories As To Michelle Chapman Only is granted. No opposition has been filed. Respondent is ordered to respond within 15 days of notice of this order. COMMISSIONER EVERETT A. HEWLETT, JR. MATTER NOT REPORTED.
